name: Video - POS Cash Up
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can learn POS cash-up procedures through video training in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " to ensure accurate end-of-day reconciliation processes. This video resource helps improve cash handling accuracy by providing visual step-by-step guidance for counting cash, reconciling payments, and completing daily closeout procedures that maintain financial integrity across retail locations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using video training for cash-up involves following visual procedures, understanding reconciliation workflows, and implementing best practices for cash management. When staff are properly trained on cash-up procedures, you can expect improved cash handling accuracy, reduced reconciliation discrepancies, and better financial controls across retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Video - POS Cash Up"}], "data-id": "video-pos-cash-up"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video we show you how to perform a Cash Up/End of Day process at POS. During this process you'll be able to count the cash within your register and balance it to the records in Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
